description: Pinned deterministic-provider retrieval averages on the FROZEN self-corpus snapshot (benchmarks/fixtures/self-corpus.json, ingested via evaluate.ts --corpus-snapshot) at retrieval depth 200. The gate corpus is frozen (not the live repo tree), so these references no longer drift as the repo grows — only a deliberate re-freeze (benchmarks/freeze-self-corpus.ts) + re-pin changes them. Used ONLY as a non-regression reference for the CI blocking gate, NOT a publishable superiority claim (the self-corpus is the pre-decontamination easy fixture; publishable numbers are commit-derived in COMMIT-DERIVED-FINDINGS.md). Deterministic hash embeddings => exact and reproducible.
